title: DRAGIN: Dynamic Retrieval Augmented Generation based on the Information Needs of LLMs

defines.name: DRAGIN
defines.definition: A dynamic RAG framework that decides when and what to retrieve for an LLM based on its real-time information needs during generation.

problem: Existing dynamic RAG methods use static retrieval timing rules and narrow query formulations that do not reflect an LLM’s full information needs during generation.
